name: What's average settlement for herniated disc work comp in Utah?

mainEntity.name: What's average settlement for herniated disc work comp in Utah?

acceptedAnswer.text: $20k-$100k+ varies by impairment, wages, future needs.[4]
acceptedAnswer.description: Varies $20k-$100k+ based on severity, job, age, surgery needs.[4] No averages set; case-specific.[4] Key factors: AMA rating, wage loss, future care; negotiate post-MMI.[4] Get impairment rating, compare offers, lawyer fights for fair value.[3] Insurers undervalue.

description: $20k-$100k+ varies by impairment, wages, future needs.[4]
